title: Turquoise3D
description: 3D-fies stuff, but not too far from Vanilla!
body:
A project that gives 3D Models to flat/cross blocks and items!

Caps of mushrooms and fungi have been made 3D, while their stems don't.
Sugar cane is almost fully 3D, with small bits remaining 2D.
The glow in the Redstone Torch is no longer weird!
Eye of Ender uses the End Portal model look, and Ender Pearls resemble the new look of the eyes!
Bricks and ingots? Got you covered.
